entities.name: APP
entities.description: Amyloid precursor protein gene, post-endocytic trafficking defects linked to AD
entities.evidence: changes in post-endocytic trafficking of amyloid precursor protein (APP) in neurons leading to an increase in amyloidogenic processing

entities.name: amyloid precursor protein
entities.description: Protein encoded by APP gene, undergoes amyloidogenic processing in endosomes
entities.evidence: post-endocytic trafficking of amyloid precursor protein (APP)

entities.name: amyloid beta
entities.description: Aβ peptide generated from APP processing, accumulates intracellularly in AD
entities.evidence: deficits in amyloid beta (Aβ) clearance, increases in intracellular Aβ

entities.name: Alzheimer disease
entities.description: Neurodegenerative disorder with endocytic dysfunction as early initiating event
entities.evidence: multiple defects in endocytic functions as early events initiating various neurodegenerative disorders, including Alzheimer's disease (AD)

entities.name: tau
entities.description: Tau protein, phosphorylation occurs downstream of endosomal dysfunction
entities.evidence: endosomal dysfunctions preceding Aβ pathology and tau phosphorylation

entities.name: endosomal trafficking
entities.description: Endosomal and post-endosomal trafficking pathway regulating APP processing
entities.evidence: Multiple genetic factors regulate each segment of endosomal and post-endosomal trafficking

entities.name: amyloidogenic processing
entities.description: Proteolytic processing of APP generating amyloid beta peptides

entities.name: endosomal dysfunction
entities.description: Endosomal pathogenic phenotypes preceding Aβ and tau pathology
entities.evidence: endosomal dysfunctions preceding Aβ pathology and tau phosphorylation

entities.name: intracellular amyloid beta accumulation
entities.description: Increased intracellular Aβ as consequence of trafficking defects

relations.evidence: post-endocytic trafficking of amyloid precursor protein (APP) in neurons
multiple defects in endocytic functions as early events initiating various neurodegenerative disorders, including Alzheimer's disease
amyloidogenic processing...deficits in amyloid beta (Aβ) clearance
increase in amyloidogenic processing...increases in intracellular Aβ
